empty.title: Waiting for your first analysis
empty.subtitle: Once you analyze a news article, you'll see the verdict, SVM strength and available actions here.

single.intro: We have the results for your news
single.detailsLine2: A value close to 0 means the news has contradictory patterns and the AI isn't 100% sure.
single.detailsLine3: High values indicate a clear and confident detection.

hero.subtitle: Switch modes in one click and process news by text, URL or CSV batches. Every analysis runs against the same model trained in Spanish.

modes.taglineUrl: Extraction and verification from a web source
modes.taglineCsv: Bulk processing of headlines in batch

analysisPanel.title: Configure the analysis
analysisPanel.textPlaceholder: Paste or type the news you want to verify...
analysisPanel.urlHint: We extract headline, context and metadata for a traceable verdict.
analysisPanel.csvHint: Upload a batch of headlines to process them in bulk.
analysisPanel.csvLockedUltra: CSV batch analysis unlocks on the Ultra plan.

home.subtitle: Usage, recent evolution and your latest analyses. All connected in real time with your account.
home.remainingTodayFoot: Daily quota available for your plan.
home.chartAria: Analyses per day in the last 10 days
home.emptyRecent: No recent analyses on your account yet.

history.subtitle: Quick view of your 5 most recent analyses or full view with search and pagination to browse your whole archive.
history.emptyHistory: You haven't saved any analyses to your history yet.
history.emptySearch: No results for that search. Try another keyword.
history.filterPlaceholder: Search by title, snippet, source or verdict...

extension.subtitle: The extension reuses your FakeNews Insight account, respects your daily quota and lets you save results to your history with one click.
extension.compatibility: Compatible with Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge (Manifest V3).
extension.installSubtitle: For now the extension is installed manually in developer mode.

steps.title: Download the ZIP
steps.description: Click 'Download extension' to open the repository's Releases page and download the latest extension ZIP.

steps.title: Unzip the folder
steps.description: Extract the ZIP to a stable location on your computer (do not delete it while using the extension).

steps.title: Enable developer mode
steps.description: Open chrome://extensions or edge://extensions and turn on the 'Developer mode' toggle in the top-right corner.

steps.title: Load the unpacked extension
steps.description: Click 'Load unpacked' and pick the folder you just extracted. Pin the icon to the toolbar for easy access.

steps.title: Sign in
steps.description: Open the popup, use the same email and password as FakeNews Insight and start analyzing texts without leaving the page you're reading.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: This page will connect with Supabase to manage keys, rotation and API permissions.

password.title: Change password
password.oauthIntro: You signed in with {{provider}}, so your password is managed directly at {{provider}} and is not stored on our platform.
password.intro: For security, we'll ask for your current password before applying the change.
password.errorMismatch: The new password and its confirmation do not match.

subscription.title: Manage subscription
subscription.intro: Change plan, schedule the return to Free at the end of the cycle or reactivate a subscription from the plan selector.

planSelector.title: Choose your subscription
planSelector.subtitle: Pick the plan that best fits your needs.
planSelector.managePortalHint: Open the Stripe portal to update your card or view invoices.
planSelector.scheduledNoticeDowngrade: You keep your {{currentPlan}} plan for {{days}} more day(s). On {{date}} you'll move to {{nextPlan}}.
planSelector.scheduledNoticeCancel: Your subscription stays active {{days}} more day(s). On {{date}} you'll return to the FREE plan.
planSelector.proratedExplain: You'll only pay the prorated difference for the current period.
planSelector.downgradeExplain: You'll keep all the perks of your current plan until the billing cycle ends.
planSelector.confirmCancelBody: No additional charges. Your account will return to the FREE plan at period end.

feedback.checkoutRedirect: Taking you to Stripe to complete the payment...
feedback.upgradeSuccess: Plan upgraded to {{plan}}. Stripe charged only the prorated difference.
feedback.downgradeScheduled: Switch to {{plan}} scheduled. You keep your current plan for {{days}} more day(s).
feedback.cancelScheduled: Cancellation scheduled. You keep your plan for {{days}} more day(s).
feedback.checkoutCancelled: Payment cancelled. No charges were made.

delete.title: Delete account (GDPR)
delete.intro: This action is irreversible. We will delete your account and associated data. To confirm, type
delete.errorPattern: Type ELIMINAR in the field to confirm the deletion.

verify.title: Claim verification
verify.subtitle: Extracts atomic claims and checks them against web evidence.
verify.noEvidence: Not enough web evidence for this claim.
